textByHashes.b2e77675d4515b22c813d4c2be69773eb3193133: Hello adventurer, welcome to the Entrana furnace.
textByHashes.002e8decebad55a15ba9ea81818417a6f22c7589: Would you like me to explain my craft to you?
textByHashes.909702a46c99b3af583963e65de1a63882d17fcd: I'm extremely pleased to hear that! I've always wanted an apprentice. Let me talk you through the secrets of glassblowing.
textByHashes.8ac96f2e6e4d1e7d02a50ed7e54ae6545d2f0571: Glass is made from soda ash and silica. We get our soda ash by collecting seaweed from the rocks - the prevailing currents make the north-west corner of the island the best place to find it, it can also be found in
textByHashes.8a300d5c798d8ce6778044d78616c809d530b489: your nets sometimes when you're fishing, on Karamja island or at the Piscatoris Fishing Colony in the nets there. To turn seaweed into soda ash, all you need to do is burn it on a fire. Feel free to use the range in
textByHashes.8452b3865f3c14e832aec4da5104ee735c491953: my house for that; it's the one directly west of here. Next we collect sand from the sandpit that you'll also find just west of here, there are others located in Yanille and Shilo Village.
textByHashes.be800bfcf44d9fa05ddab68d56d964d4956ee2a3: You'll need a bucket to carry it in. Tell you what, you can have this old one of mine.
textByHashes.2e00551418b05cd55fcf709b4725c68ec1e4039f: Bring the sand and the soda ash back here and melt them together in the furnace, and there you have it - molten glass!
textByHashes.379481cf93e9a7743aca9bf208994d50747215f0: There are many things you can use the molten glass for once you have made it. Depending on how talented you are, you could try turning it into something, like a fishbowl, for example. If you'd like to try your hand at
textByHashes.fb5a2245bcb96253b1e3f1670d4a72a8c2851ce4: the fine art of glassblowing you can use my spare glassblowing pipe. I think I left it on the chest of drawers in my house this morning.
textByHashes.372974315e076b19911c2c5c2ed3329518ce7694: Alternatively I am always happy to buy the molten glass from you, saves me running about making it for myself.
textByHashes.b1be3a084307bef84a98ab8c458beb312dad4421: Tell you what, because you've been interested in my art, I'll pay you the premium price of 20 gold pieces for each piece of molten glass you bring me
textByHashes.9ae660032b1fde96e586dd0713382daefd1a9e04: Ok, suit yourself. Nobody seems to be interested in the skilled crafts these days.
textByHashes.9ee4369c675a43ae410f04c1d4c91e85a86ee95d: If you should change your mind, come back and talk to me.
textByHashes.f9428b5ffdf4dfcabe0944b63486bdd5af152d6d: Ah , have you come to sell me some molten glass?
textByHashes.2c169bbcf430ee64b179ddea7db0ec960c807eb9: Fantastic! Let's see, for that much glass I could pay you ...
textByHashes.32211b9833333b1a1cc2bfc52db61707362aaaa7: Pity. Well you can find me here if you change your mind.
textByHashes.838f0bfc57b9d7cb33d8e3c3e015d3f34687a5c1: Thanks very much, . I'll buy any more that you bring.
textByHashes.49a6075c129c96ff3adeb48f2a733d39a2836aad: Umm, not much point me trying to pay you for glass you don't have, is there?
textByHashes.990bcfe4c265ca2519a46a102afdade434c1a133: I'll make it simple for you. You bring glass, me pay shiny gold coins.
textByHashes.2ac5a877cbd809995c3ee3323e7d3949a87e2201: ...errr, well should you get any I'm quite happy to pay for it. Remember, I'll pay you 20 gold pieces for each piece of molten glass you get for me.
textByHashes.75a905b2ce15ffec48a5e797f0d87730fb009a56: So what did you want to talk to me about then?
textByHashes.7cd56c2111f7bfa7c29321684105531cdc68b5ca: Well, I am very busy at the moment, but I guess I can take 5 minutes off for my favourite student.
textByHashes.40329e7b8a854b439df7b38bad8541179094c04e: Fritz the Glassblower: my house for that; it's the one directly west of here. Next we collect sand from the sandpit that you'll also find just west of here, there are others located in Yanille and Shilo Village.
textByHashes.d71654b1846a11622f00fa91a83e72eaecd40275: You can use the bucket I gave you earlier.
textByHashes.9d39f49e69b1decf0d4b290fb6b62e723d1945c3: Do I look like I'm made of buckets? You'll just have to buy another from a general store.
textByHashes.1f443459c216a07e46c7326a305df4fdd09c8ee1: Hello then. I'm afraid I don't have any time to chat though. The druids of Taverley have placed a huge order for glass vials, so I'm very busy.
